name: Orange Ooze Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 20 to 25 minutes Cooking time: 25 minutes Utensils:
Measuring cups and spoons, cupcake baking pans, paper cupcake liners, two small mixing bowls, electric mixer, mixing spoon, large mixing bowl, oven mitts.
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line cupcake baking pans with paper cupcake liners.
3. In a small mixing bowl, use an electric mixer to combine cream cheese, egg, and sugar. Blend in 2 drops yellow food coloring and 1 drop red food coloring, adding more coloring if necessary to reach desired shade. Stir in chocolate chips; set filling aside.
4. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
5. In a second small mixing bowl, combine water, vegetable oil, vinegar, and vanilla. Add the contents of the small mixing bowl to the large mixing bowl and stir with a mixing spoon to combine.
6. Using a mixing spoon or soup spoon, fill cupcake liners half full with cupcake batter, then place 1 teaspoon filling at the center of each.
7. Place cupcake pans in oven; bake approximately 25 minutes or until cupcakes are done.
8. Remove pan from oven wearing oven mitts and turn off oven.
9. Frost with orange icing, if desired, or let the orange filling ooze out as a surprise.
